channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Potholes and bad road surface the whole length of the road, 3rd June
item.description:
The potholes have been getting increasingly worse for months
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clifton Gardens, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood and box, 3rd June
item.description:
Wood and box left plus graffiti on bin store

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robinscroft Mews, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road damaged causing harsh bumps and rough ride, 3rd June
item.description:
Street and speed bumps on this street damaged could cause tyre damaged street in need of repair ASAP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Killick Street, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous fly tipping in this area, 3rd June
item.description:
I attached 2 fly tipping issues. 1 has been resolved but this remains. Pavement is blocked with bed mattress etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newent Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very low overhanging branches., 3rd June
item.description:
Park Crescent Road , branches overhanging foot paths , very low and continues onto Park Crescent which has same problem up to Lesley Park road . The verges are uncut and weeds are 2/3 ‘ high , where are the contractors? This is within The Conservation Area .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Crescent, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain is causing huge lake across the road, 3rd June
item.description:
This is the third time I have reported this Some drivers are very concerned at driving through. A blocked drain on the corner outside 17 Woodside Lane is causing the problem this needs unblocking asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Woodside Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling, 3rd June
item.description:
This is unacceptable been like two weeks now and recycling hasn’t been collected and why hasn’t the caretaker reported this issue. This is ridiculous and residents can’t recycle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weymouth Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road closure on Whiston road. no information about access to residents, 3rd June
item.description:
Whiston Road has been closed for works for two days. There is no access to my home at 5 Eleanor Court, 140 Whiston Road E2 8RR except through the gated traffic lights at the junction with Pritchard Row. Residents have received no information about access.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove, 3rd June
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vast quantities of rubbish including dirty nappies, food and charcoal, 3rd June
item.description:
The commercial bins at the back of the pub are overflowing with waste and there are bags and food waste all over the pavement. There is a plastic bag full of dirty nappies, chicken bones and charcoal and sand. This is a persistent problem and needs to be addressed as a matter of urgency before it creates health and safety and vermin issues.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodland Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd June
item.description:
Various items of fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reinickendorf Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in middle of road opposite 23 Stradella Road., 3rd June
item.description:
This pothole has been here for six months and was already reported on 16 February 2026 and not fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Stradella Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked draim, 3rd June
item.description:
Drain blocked with silt after recent rain
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood Ride, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 18 inch pothole near centre of road. Surface crack across entire width of road, 3rd June
item.description:
Pothole first developed 6 weeks ago and is beginning to spread. Overall road surface in bad condition, with a number of surface cracks across entire width of road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stevedale Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drainage channels., 3rd June
item.description:
Both drainage channels, covered by metal grating, either side of the zebra crossing outside 106 Cazenove Road are blocked.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging too much, 3rd June
item.description:
Station Owned tree overhanging road, less than 3M clearance Opposite houses along Lower Station Road, approximately opposite 15 lower station road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stadium Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On left and right side next to 1306 round about, 3rd June
item.description:
Full of rubbish

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation which is causing wall to be leaning over pavement, 3rd June
item.description:
The bushes are getting bigger and the wall is leaning more even though only short. Has moved considerably over last couple of months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for public litter bin due to repeated littering near football ground, 3rd June
item.description:
Please could Bexley Council assess this stretch of road for a public litter bin and increased litter picking/street cleansing. There is currently no public litter bin on this side of the busy road for approximately 200 metres, despite this stretch serving a pub, Welling football ground, shops, parked vehicles and regular pedestrian traffic. We regularly see litter left along the kerb and pavement, especially after parked vehicles move. I have personally witnessed people throwing bottles, cans, food packaging and other rubbish from vehicles. The issue is worse than it appears when cars are parked, because litter collects underneath cars and along the kerb line. Suggested bin locations for assessment: 1. On the residential side where the pavement is wider, near the existing bollards/street furniture. 2. On the football ground side, near the blue gates/entrance area, or another suitable location along that frontage. The nearest bin provision does not appear adequate for this side of the road, and crossing a busy road to use a bin is unrealistic for many pedestrians. A public litter bin here would provide an obvious disposal point for bottles, cans and takeaway rubbish, especially around match days, evenings and busy periods. Please could the Council consider installing a public litter bin at a suitable location, or advise which department handles requests for new bins.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park View Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded road markings please repaint, 3rd June
item.description:
Faded yellow road markings so people keep parking in front of and blocking access to our driveway. Please could we have double yellows or Do Not Park here road markings repainted as making life pretty frustrating for us. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmer Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
